use_cases: Displaying scrolling announcements or featured content on hero sections
Creating promotional banners with continuous text animation
Showing featured sponsors or partners in a scrolling carousel
Adding eye-catching animated text to landing pages
Displaying scrolling testimonials or brand names
ai_summary: A marquee component that creates continuous horizontal scrolling text animation using Framer Motion. Features outlined/stroked typography with gradient fade effects on left and right edges. Theme-aware with dark/light mode support and offers customizable font size, animation duration, stroke width, and repeat count for versatile use in hero sections and promotional banners.
